context: Tests whether AppMigrationKit testing guidance uses the test-only tester correctly and preserves the boundary around real system migration sessions.

checklist.name: Tester type
checklist.description: Uses the AppMigrationKit tester for automated validation.

checklist.name: Test host
checklist.description: Runs tester-based tests from unit tests hosted by the containing app.

checklist.name: Export controller
checklist.description: Exercises the export controller resource export method in the test flow.

checklist.name: Import controller
checklist.description: Exercises the import controller resource import method in the test flow.

checklist.name: Optional requests
checklist.description: Accounts for optional migration or import requests and progress parameters in tester calls.

checklist.name: Completion registration
checklist.description: Registers import completion in tests that verify first-launch migration status behavior.

checklist.name: Status verification
checklist.description: Checks migration status handling after registering test import completion.

checklist.name: Production exclusion
checklist.description: States that tester APIs and synthetic test triggers must not ship in production code.

checklist.name: No real trigger
checklist.description: Avoids claiming the shipping app can directly start or manage a real device-to-device migration session.

checklist.name: Manual QA scope
checklist.description: Limits manual app-side validation to diagnostics or first-launch status handling rather than real migration initiation.
